findings.issue: No test for evidence.js and no indicator of parallel model review consensus integration.
findings.fix: Add integration test or placeholder smoke test for evidence module.

findings.issue: CI gate recording for Qlty presence is missing; spec requires recording when absent.
findings.fix: Add a workflow step to check Qlty and record availability in build log.

findings.issue: No Promptfoo or deterministic fallback eval recorded as required by spec.
findings.fix: Add a simple eval script that runs and logs a fallback status.

suggested_next_steps: Add tests for evidence.js model consensus integration
Implement Qlty availability check with logging
Implement Promptfoo or fallback eval with recording
Consider adding stale-data penalty in scoring based on time since last update
